name: remote-control
author: dudu
description: A local mobile remote for Mac media playback.

scripts.dist:mac: node scripts/with-env.js node scripts/verify-mac-release-env.js && node scripts/with-env.js electron-builder --mac dmg zip --universal && node scripts/with-env.js node scripts/verify-mac-release.js
scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/menu-bar.js && node --check scripts/with-env.js && node --check scripts/verify-mac-release-env.js && node --check scripts/verify-mac-release.js

extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Media Remote Control sends keyboard events through System Events so your phone can control focused media playback.
extendInfo.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Media Remote Control serves a local pairing page so your phone can control this Mac on the same network.
